results.title: India’s first offshore airport near Kore beach: Key facts you need to know
results.description: India’s first offshore airport is planned near Kore beach in Maharashtra’s Palghar district. The project is expected to serve as the third international airport for the Mumbai Metropolitan Region, with two runways, major cargo capacity and links to key transport projects.

results.title: Harbor Core Bond Fund Q1 2026 Commentary
results.description: During the first quarter, the Harbor Core Bond returned 0.04%, outperforming its benchmark, the Bloomberg US Aggregate Bond Index, which returned -0.05%. Read more here.

results.title: NSITF seeks stronger government-employers-workers partnership
results.description: THE Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer of the Nigeria Social Insurance Trust Fund (NSITF), Mr. Oluwaseun Faleye, has called for stronger collaboration among government, employers and workers to drive enterprise competitiveness, protect workers and achieve inclusive national growth. results.title: ERC cites Yuchengco’s MGI for outstanding operational performance
results.description: In selecting MGI for the Geothermal Generation category, ERC highlighted its “significant contribution to the stability, adequacy, and resilience of the Philippine power system.

results.title: South Lanarkshire Council to offer 5.2 per cent increase to private childcare providers if plans get the go-ahead
results.description: The proposed increase follows the Scottish Government’s commitment to raise the Real Living Wage for childcare workers in the private and third sectors to £13.45 per hour from April 2026.
